column1: -- This file contains updates and additions to the data table.
-- It can modify most parameters, but some, like TABLEID and MATRIX can not be modified here.
-- All types different from CS, PX, CR and SQ are ignored.
-- Keywords not present in meta-default sheet/tab in common_meta.xlsx are ignored.
-- Column set - to use as either STUB, HEADING or DATA
-- DATA can also have precision and unit description (separated by #). Unit descriptions are translated in CR.
-- Keywords present in the px-standard can be set and updated here.
-- Translations for each parameter can be set by filling out LANGUAGE column. If language is not set here it will be the fallback language for translations to languages not set.
-- SUBJECT-CODE, SUBJECT-AREA, SUBJECT, TITLE and CONTENTS should be set here if it is not set in common metadata.
-- If a column is refered (for example in the scope of a keyword), use the column name from the table.
-- The CONTACT keyword is set with parts separated by #. They are appended to default (can be set in common_meta), and several can be added here.

Any string here will only be shown as text. No URL-parsing, formating or clickable link.
This table is made to show current functionality for some parameters in px file format.

column1: -- CR, Column Rename, is used to show intuitive and translated names on columns.
-- Column names from the table can be renamed for different languages here.
-- SQ, Saved Query, is used to set a standard view of the table when it is opened.
-- The number represents the amount of values selected on each column.
-- A negative number selects values from the other end of the list of values.
-- STUFF BELLOW THIS LINE ARE ONLY FOR TESTING --
